changes.reason: Move Apple official 72-hour old-passcode reset path earlier in the iPhone unavailable flow to reduce unnecessary erase/data-loss guidance, and replace the English source with the current Chinese Apple Support page.

queries: iPhone 不可用 忘记密码 旧密码 72 小时
iPhone unavailable forgot passcode old passcode reset
安全锁定 忘记密码 输入先前密码
canonicalReview.notes: The existing canonical covers iPhone unavailable, Security Lockout, forgotten device passcode, eSIM, computer restore, and Activation Lock. The new evidence is a subcase inside the same symptom cluster, so update the existing canonical rather than creating a duplicate.
